Issue-ID: CIMAN-33
Signed-off-by: dependabot[bot] <support@github.com>
Change-Id: Ibefca85fdb41968d420e4e971f937a735ad09bc1
GitHub-PR: https://github.com/onap/portal-ng-ui/pull/172
GitHub-Hash: d59cba5f78f0dc6b
Signed-off-by: onap.gh2gerrit <releng+onap-gh2gerrit@linuxfoundation.org>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Verified+1

Build Successful 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/portal-ng-ui-docker-verify-master/204/ : SUCCESS

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/portal-ng-ui-docker-verify-master/204

Abandoned

Abandoning: master branch already has this dependency at the target version (or newer). This change is redundant.

Context: A historical bug in lfreleng-actions/github2gerrit-action caused incorrect change correlation when dependabot updated existing PRs in place, leaving orphaned Gerrit changes. This cleanup resynchronises Gerrit with GitHub state. Dependabot will re-raise an equivalent change if a newer version becomes available.
